🧬 MACIÀ'S JOURNEY

AN INTERACTIVE CV — EXPLORE TO DISCOVER THE CANDIDATE
📱 For the best experience, we recommend rotating your device to landscape mode.

🗺️ How to play

🏛️Walk up to any building and press E (or Space) to enter — each one reveals a different chapter of Macià's profile.
🎯There are 7 buildings to discover. Visit them all to unlock a secret 8th location.
🕹️Move with W A S D or Arrow keys, or use the on-screen joystick on touch devices. Close any panel with ESC or E.
🗺️Check the mini-map (top-right): each building has a recommended number (1–7). The next one to visit pulses on the map and has a golden beacon in the world. Feel free to explore in any order!

🚗 Watch out for cars!

❤️You start with 3 lives. Getting hit by a car costs you one. Lose them all and progress resets.
🦓Use the zebra crossings to cross roads safely — cars will stop while you're on one.
⚡After being hit, you get a brief invincibility window (the avatar blinks). Use it wisely!

💀 GAME OVER

A car got you. All progress reset.
But Macià never gives up!
